label: Task 1 — Add column (easy)
actions: ALTER TABLE customers ADD COLUMN loyalty_tier VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'standard' NOT NULL;

label: Task 2 — Table split (medium)
actions: CREATE TABLE product_pricing (product_id SMALLINT PRIMARY KEY, unit_price REAL, units_in_stock SMALLINT, units_on_order SMALLINT, reorder_level SMALLINT, discontinued INTEGER, CONSTRAINT fk_pp_product FOREIGN KEY (product_id) REFERENCES products(product_id))

label: Task 3 — Multi-table migration (hard)
actions: ALTER TABLE orders ADD COLUMN order_status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending';
UPDATE orders SET order_status = CASE WHEN shipped_date IS NULL THEN 'pending' ELSE 'shipped' END;
